evals.prompt: J'ai reçu cette convocation d'AG : /Users/montimage/buildspace/luongnv89/francais-skills/resources/2-residence-du-verger-2026.pdf. Peux-tu me dire l'essentiel et ce à quoi je dois faire attention avant de voter ?
evals.expected_output: The skill ingests the PDF, writes a summary to ~/.ag-copro/summaries/le-verger-a-palaiseau-2026.md, then briefs the user with meeting date, vote-by-correspondence deadline, budget Y-o-Y, and a 5-bullet 'what to pay attention to' list.
expectations: A summary file is written to ~/.ag-copro/summaries/ matching the residence name and year 2026
The summary file frontmatter contains residence, meeting_date (2026-06-16), syndic ('IMMO DE FRANCE PARIS IDF'), and owner_tantiemes (233)
The response identifies the meeting as 'mardi 16 juin 2026 à 19h00' at the Salle de réunion de la copropriété in Palaiseau
The response states the vote-by-correspondence deadline as 12/06/2026 (3 jours francs before the meeting)
The response highlights the budget jump from 49 350 € (N) to 57 950 € (N+2), approximately +17 %
The response flags the new 'salaires employé d'immeuble' line (~13 000 €) as a likely gardien hire to verify
The response flags Résolution 16 (350 € carrelage chez locataire) and Résolution 19 (bâches publicitaires) as unusual items worth attention
The response is in French because the question was in French

evals.prompt: Here's my AG convocation: /Users/montimage/buildspace/luongnv89/francais-skills/resources/17-rue-philippe-de-dangeau-2025.pdf. When's the meeting, what's the budget, and what do I need to watch out for?
evals.expected_output: The skill ingests the VPàt Immo formatted PDF, writes a summary, and briefs the user in English (since the question is in English) while preserving French legal terms like 'syndic', 'travaux', 'tantièmes', 'Article 25'.
expectations: A summary file is written to ~/.ag-copro/summaries/ matching the residence name (17-rue-philippe-de-dangeau) and year 2025
The summary frontmatter identifies the syndic as 'VPàt Immo' (or 'VPAT IMMO')
The response identifies the meeting as Wednesday 14 May 2025 at 18:00, 52 Rue Saint Charles in Versailles
The response identifies the budget as 24 000 € for both period N+1 (2025) and N+2 (2026), noting the budget is flat
The response flags the multiple travaux résolutions (chemisage colonne d'eaux usées, remplacement tronçon fonte fuyard, ravalement) and their respective amounts
The response flags Résolution 21 (convention d'honoraires de Maître COGNY for ~6 120 €) as a notable legal/procédural item
The response is in English because the question was in English
French legal terms (syndic, travaux, tantièmes, Article 24/25) are preserved in italics or quotes rather than translated

evals.expected_output: With no path argument and at least one previously-ingested summary in ~/.ag-copro/summaries/, the skill lists available summaries and asks the user which to load. If none exist, it asks for a PDF path.
expectations: The skill does NOT immediately try to ingest a PDF
The skill lists the files present in ~/.ag-copro/summaries/ (or states the directory is empty)
The skill asks the user to either pick an existing summary or provide a path to a new PDF
The skill does not invent or hallucinate residences
